tasks.label: Stop Mouse Server
tasks.command: powershell -NoProfile -Command "$processes = @(netstat -ano | findstr ':5000' | ForEach-Object { $_ -replace '^\s+TCP\s+.*?\s+(\d+).*$', '$1' } | Get-Unique); if ($processes) { $processes | ForEach-Object { taskkill /PID $_ /F } } else { Write-Host 'No process listening on port 5000' }"
